name: mode2_ordered_chain
notes: Mode-2 effect dispatch (contract TODO #2). The FSM declares NO `effects` slot; the runtime scrapes its Effect bindings (a,b,c — declared out of order: c,a,b) and toposorts them by the `order = ⟨a,b,c⟩` ordering-edge declaration (edges a→b→c) before dispatching. Result is the TOTAL order [a,b,c] = [Println("first"), Println("second"), Exit(0)], which is seed-independent (the EVIDENT_DISPATCH_SEED random tie-break only matters for PARTIAL orders — the documented residual). dispatch_mode:2 → the CurrentRuntime gate witnesses the real toposort via collect_tick_effects(primary_var=None); confirmed independently by `evident effect-run` (stdout first/second, exit 0). The SMT capture encodes the resulting dispatch order under `order` (effects_var), which both SMT engines decode. Doubly-witnessed: CurrentRuntime toposort + SmtLib Method A/B.
